_readme: CANONICAL source-candidate intake for the Georgism wiki (established 2026-07-17, Floyd).
Agents adding research candidates: APPEND to the 'queue' array and COMMIT+PUSH this file
to the repo (branch or main, like Hugh Bot's sources/slack-research-candidates.json).
Do NOT write to /workspace/wiki-queue.json or any container-local path - those are
ephemeral, invisible to other sessions, and lost on container recycle.
Item schema (same as the Slack candidates file): {url, source, author, date, context, topics}.
'source' = where it was found (slack channel, agent name, manual, etc.).
Triage sessions consume from here, record verdicts in a dated triage file (see
sources/slack-research-triage-2026-07-14.json for the pattern), and mark items
consumed by moving them to the 'consumed' array with a verdict.
